texto: Maximus was cleaning his blade on the dead man’s wolfskin. ‘You promised him his life,’ the Greek said. ‘No, I said death was his last worry.’ Maximus swung up on to Pale Horse. ‘Is that not so for all of us?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Harry Sidebottom que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “Maximus was cleaning his blade on the dead man’s wolfskin. ‘You promised him his life,’ the Greek…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre vida, lies, maximus, com foco em luto e vida.
